form.title: Tank Configuration

instructions.title: How to Use
instructions.step1: Enter your tank dimensions (diameter and length in inches)
instructions.step2: Click Calculate to see the optimal steel order with minimum waste

tooltips.steelGrade: Select the type of steel for your tank. A-36 is most common for standard tanks.
tooltips.thickness: Wall thickness of the steel plate. 1/4" is the most commonly used thickness.
tooltips.diameter: Inner diameter of the cylindrical tank in inches. The calculator will add thickness to compute outer diameter.
tooltips.length: Total length of the tank body (shell) in inches, not including the heads.
tooltips.heads: Number of circular end caps. Usually 2 (one for each end of the tank).
tooltips.sheetWidths: Click to select/deselect. Only selected widths will be considered when calculating the optimal sheet combination.
tooltips.sheetLengths: Click to select/deselect. The calculator will find the best combination of these lengths to minimize waste.

form.sheetWidthsHelp: Click to toggle which widths your supplier offers
form.sheetLengthsHelp: Click to toggle which lengths your supplier offers

validation.headsPositive: Number of heads must be at least 0
